Passport Photo Maker

Create correctly sized passport and visa photos in your browser. Choose Indian passport (35×45mm), 2×2 inch, or a custom size. Download as JPG or generate a printable sheet.

No Signup
Browser-based
Free to use
Privacy-first
Files stay on your device. Not uploaded anywhere.

Upload your photo

JPG, PNG or WEBP • Front-facing, good lighting

Max 15MB per file

Ad space reserved for future

Indian Passport Photo Requirements

For Indian passport applications, the standard photo size is 35mm × 45mm with a plain white background. The face should cover about 70–80% of the frame. Both eyes must be open and clearly visible. The photo must be recent (taken within the last 6 months).

Always verify the latest requirements on the official Passport Seva portal (passportindia.gov.in) before submitting your application, as requirements can change.

How to Use This Tool

  1. Upload a clear, front-facing photo with good lighting
  2. Select your target photo size (Indian Passport, 2×2 inch, or custom)
  3. Choose background colour (white is standard for most documents)
  4. Click "Generate Passport Photo" to preview the result
  5. Download as JPG for digital use or as a PDF sheet for printing

Photo Requirements for Common Indian Documents

  • Passport: 35×45mm, white background, plain light clothing
  • Aadhaar: Colour photo, white/light background, no cap or sunglasses
  • PAN Card: 3.5×3.5cm, white background, recent photo
  • Visa (US, UK, Schengen): 2×2 inch (50×50mm), white background
  • Exam forms (SSC, UPSC, IBPS): Typically 3.5×4.5cm, under 50–100KB
  • Driving licence: Check RTO requirements — usually 3.5×4.5cm

Tips for a Good Passport Photo

  • Take the photo in natural light near a window — avoid harsh flash
  • Use a plain white or light wall as background if possible
  • Face the camera directly, with a neutral expression
  • Remove glasses (as per recent Indian passport rules)
  • Wear plain clothing without busy patterns
  • Keep hair away from the face so both ears are visible

Practical guidance for Passport Photo Maker

Create standard passport and visa photos in 35×45mm, 2×2 inch and other sizes. Generate a printable sheet of multiple photos. Image tools are useful when an application form asks for exact pixel dimensions, a fixed format, or a strict file size. JaldiDocs is designed for everyday Indian document workflows where a small mismatch in size, format, page order, or file weight can cause an upload to fail.

Before you use the tool

  • Keep the original file unchanged so you can restart if a form has a different requirement.
  • Check whether the portal asks for pixels, millimetres, page size, file format, or maximum KB/MB.
  • Use a clear file name without special symbols before uploading to government, exam, tax, or business portals.

After downloading

  • Use JPG for photos unless the portal specifically asks for PNG.
  • Avoid enlarging tiny images because it can make the result blurry.
  • Check the downloaded image dimensions before submitting it to an official form.
  • Open the final file once on your device and confirm it is readable before submitting it anywhere.

Privacy and accuracy note

The tool runs in your browser wherever possible, which means your file is processed on your own device instead of being uploaded to JaldiDocs. Official requirements can still change, so always compare the output with the latest instructions from the website or organization where you plan to submit it.
